description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with extensive use of wood paneling on its exterior. The structure includes multiple levels, with a large open deck area that hosts a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a sunken seating area. Expansive glass doors and windows provide ample natural light and connect the interior living spaces to the outdoor deck. The house also includes a rooftop terrace, accessible by exterior stairs, and a partially covered balcony. The layout is open and spacious, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing outdoor living and entertainment. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on blending indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, multi-level house with wood paneling, large glass windows, a spacious deck, pool, and rooftop terrace, designed for open, indoor-outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main deck, pool, sunken seating area, and the prominent wood-paneled facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the deck, pool, multiple glass doors, and the open layout of the main living spaces.
description_view_2: Angled rear view displaying the rooftop terrace, balcony, and the integration of indoor and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Back view showing the upper-level rooms, exterior stairs, and the clean, boxy lines of the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features wide glass doors, a few steps leading up from the deck, and a minimalist, open design with no porch or columns.
